Philip Ekholm

IT-consultant based in Malmö, Sweden

Selected Work

Panera

An image editor built with JavaFX featuring filters, adjustments, and a clean interface.

BloX

A side project exploring creative coding and interactive experiences.

Autonomous Robot

An autonomous robot capable of navigating and interacting with its environment.
